name: Panang Loog Chin Nua (Thai Meatballs Panang Curry)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Thai or sweet basil leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Form ground beef into 1-inch diameter balls and coat evenly with flour, shaking off any excess.
2. In a medium saucepan, brown meatballs in oil over low heat. The meatballs do not need to be thoroughly cooked.
3. Drain the meatballs on paper towels and set aside.
4. Add the curry paste to the remaining oil from frying the meatballs and sauté for 1 minute over low heat.
5. Increase the heat to medium, add coconut milk, and cook for 2-3 minutes longer.
6. Stir in fish sauce, sugar, peanut butter, and blend well.
7. Return the meatballs to the pan of curry mixture and cook until they are well done.
8. Transfer the curry to a serving bowl and sprinkle with basil leaves. Serve with cooked rice.
